burden.dalyPerCapita: moderate; heart failure and hospitalization burden

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography to quantify regurgitation and LV function; evaluate symptoms

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; diagnosis via auscultation and echo
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with access to repair and transcatheter options

regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Surgical repair preferred; transcatheter repair (e.g., MitraClip) when indicated
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: High procedural costs and uneven access across regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Specialized valve centers and broad access to repair
